S.FORM: Kyle Anderson hya ga NBA pgnaw mari misuw qaniy, qutux sp'agal tins tay suruw / praw maki' tay glaing. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 9, Kyle Anderson, squliq na p'unro. Kyle AndersonжҳҜNBAзҸҫиҒ·зҗғе“Ў cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kjle an*ers~Й•on Д§ja ЙЈa nОІa pЙЈnaw mari mis~Й•uw qanij, qutux s~Й•pК”aЙЈal tins~Й• taj s~Й•uruw / praw makiК” taj ЙЈlaiЕӢ. kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj *, kjle an*ers~Й•on, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. kjle an*ers~Й•on*nОІa**** КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
